name: Checklist
goal: Render a task list — static read-only by default, interactive with persist-key / allow-edit opt-in.
description: Markdown-style task list rendered as native checkboxes. Without persist-key, this is a static read-only display — no localStorage writes happen and no mutation events fire. Items may be supplied as a JSON attribute (items prop) or as <ce-check-item> slot children per CDR-005 (resolution order: JSON prop non-empty → slot children → empty state). Setting persist-key mirrors state to localStorage so progress survives reloads. With allow-edit, a small input appears so users can append new items inline. With group-by="category", items are rendered under <h4> section headers.

props.name: items
props.description: Array of {id, text, checked?, category?} items. When non-empty takes priority over slot children per CDR-005.

props.name: allowEdit
props.description: Show an inline input to add new items.

props.name: persistKey
props.description: When set, mirror state to localStorage at key `ce-checklist:<persistKey>`. Without this attribute no localStorage writes occur.

props.name: groupBy
props.description: When "category", render <h4> section headers grouping items by their category field. Items without a category fall into a default unlabelled group.

events.name: ce-check-change
events.description: Fired when an item is toggled. Only fires when allowEdit or persistKey is set — static mode checkboxes are disabled.

events.name: ce-checklist-add
events.description: Fired when a new item is added via the inline input (allow-edit only).

slots.description: <ce-check-item> children. When no items JSON is provided, the checklist reads id/checked/category attributes and inner HTML from each <ce-check-item> child per CDR-005.

cssVariables.name: --ce-space-1
cssVariables.description: Small spacing used as group-header bottom padding.

cssVariables.name: --ce-space-2
cssVariables.description: Gap between checkbox and text, and between rows.

cssVariables.name: --ce-space-3
cssVariables.description: Margin above add row and above group headers.

cssVariables.name: --ce-text-sm
cssVariables.description: Add-input font size and group header font size.

cssVariables.name: --ce-muted
cssVariables.description: Done item text color and group header color.

cssVariables.name: --ce-border
cssVariables.description: Add-input border and group header bottom border.

globalDependencies.purpose: Persist state when persist-key is set.

sideEffects.description: Reads/writes localStorage when persist-key is set. Without persist-key, no storage operations occur.
